chapter_title.en: Chapter on Eating and Drinking From Gold and Silver Utensils and Other Etiquettes of Eating

text: 4243 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "شُرْبُ اَلْمَاءِ مِنْ قِيَامٍ بِالنَّهَارِ أَدَرُّ لِلْعِرْقِ وَ أَقْوَى لِلْبَدَنِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4243 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), said:
"Drinking water while standing during the day increases perspiration and strengthens the body."
